name: demo-claude-code-obsidian
description: An example project to explore working with Claude Code and Obsidian
author: Rob Brennan <rob@sploosh.ai>

scripts.launch:gpt-oss: cd example-vaults/personal-kb && ollama launch claude --model gpt-oss:20b
scripts.launch:gemma4: cd example-vaults/personal-kb && ollama launch claude --model gemma4:e2b
